$meta.note: No public design-system surface; tokens reverse-engineered from production styled-components output. No :root custom properties exposed by the application.

brand.green_role: Active state only — selected role-filter chip background + 'Notice' eyebrow (13/700). Never on a primary CTA, never on body text. Single saturated hue, no green ladder.

semantic_status._note: No semantic ladder (error/success/warning) observed on home or positions surfaces this pass; flagged as inferred. Job-status badges (마감/D-day) and validation states require a follow-up capture on a saved-job / application-form surface.

scale.0: 0px — body, cards (sharp corners are the default — 85% of sampled elements)

radius.rule: Three pill radii encode three filter classes — 20px for taxonomy chips, 100px for outlined dropdowns, 8px for the system CTA. Body and cards stay at 0px (architectural sharpness).

typography.weight_gap: No 600. Jump from 400 (body) to 700 (heading/active) — emphasis is binary, not graduated.

spacing.chip_padding: 7px 16px (role) / 8px 30px 8px 12px (outlined dropdown — extra right padding for caret)

elevation.depth_strategy: surface tint only (#FBFBFB footer vs #FFF page); no box-shadow, no border on cards. Hairlines are colour-tint, not borders.

primary_cta.use: 회원가입 / 로그인 — auth funnel; the only 8px-radius pill in the system

role_filter_chip_active.use: Selected job-role chip in /positions filter row

outlined_dropdown.border: 1px solid (border colour not captured cleanly — flagged for UPDATE)
outlined_dropdown.use: 기술스택 / 경력 / 지역 / 태그 multi-select trigger

inferred_or_pending: hover/pressed/focus/disabled states — not captured (no interaction simulated this pass)
error/success colour ladder — not exposed on home or positions surface
card surface tokens — JobCard inspected at structural level only (radius=0px, no shadow), inner spacing pending
JobCard chip colour family (스타트업 / 시리즈 A / 시리즈 B / 시리즈 C+ / 코스닥 등 funding-stage chips) — needs detail-page capture
Mobile viewport (390×844) tokens — not captured this pass
